data.content:
Architecture decisions clarified by user:
- `explore` becomes a first-class knot type.
- Loom workflows should stay independent and should NOT declare supported knot types.
- Knot-type association belongs to Knots, via a registry from knot type to installed workflows/default workflow.
- Builtin Loom workflows ship with Knots and are compiled/rendered/registered during installation.
- Installation should enforce an invariant that every builtin knot type has at least one registered workflow.
- Builtin workflow installation/refresh must preserve user-installed workflows.
